full_name: Complaint Learning and Agentic Resolution Assistant

compliance_rules_kb.description: Compliance rules for validating resolution letters

triage_agent.name: triage-agent-v1
triage_agent.responsibility: classify complaint, assign priority, pull matching transactions from S3
triage_agent.output: classified complaint with priority, category, sentiment, matched transactions

resolution_agent.name: resolution-agent-v1
resolution_agent.responsibility: draft resolution letter using Bedrock, check against compliance rules via KB
resolution_agent.output: draft letter with confidence_score and compliance check results

decision_agent.name: decision-agent-v1
decision_agent.responsibility: resolve or escalate based on confidence and risk thresholds
decision_agent.output: final status — resolved or escalated with reason
